reviews.review_description: Great game. It can be a little confusing and the AI voice gets on my nerves, but I love the attention to detail. Very immersive and relaxing game
I love the game, but there is a problem where a part of the bazooka in the d-day Mission does not react to the grinder, locking me out of finishing the job

developer_response.body:
Thanks for reporting this 🙏

If you can, please join our Discord so we can look into it more closely — we’ll do our best to fix it as quickly as possible 💪

~VRF Team

reviews.review_description: You could say it even has a therapeutic effect. You’re given broken, dirty weapons and other battle tools, and you restore them to a spotless condition using various instruments. It’s very satisfying and really helps reduce stress. You can even learn some history related to the objects you restore.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 😊 
We’re really happy to hear that you find it relaxing and satisfying. It’s great to know the restoration process helps you unwind and that you enjoy learning a bit of history along the way. Thanks for playing and for sharing your thoughts!

~VR Factory Games

reviews.review_description: Fixing and rebuilding weapons with your hands feels great, very immersive. No action, just relaxing workshop vibes. A bit slow, but perfect for casual VR sessions. 👍

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your thoughts! 😊
We’re glad you enjoyed the hands-on rebuilding and the immersive, relaxing workshop vibe. The slower pace is definitely meant for chill, casual VR sessions, so it’s great to hear it hit the mark for you. Appreciate the feedback! 👍

reviews.review_description: The game feels complex at the start, but once you get the hang of the mechanics, BattleCrafter VR is relaxing and satisfying.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! 😊
We’re glad you found the gameplay satisfying once you got the hang of it. That sense of immersion and hands-on crafting is exactly what we aimed for, so it’s awesome to hear it resonated with you.

reviews.review_description: BattleCrafter VR is a really satisfying restoration sim. The hands-on crafting feels detailed and immersive, and the futuristic workshop atmosphere is great. Perfect if you enjoy precision-based VR gameplay.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the feedback! 🙏 We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the hands-on crafting and the workshop atmosphere. It means a lot knowing the precision-based VR gameplay is hitting the mark!

~VR Factory Games

Thanks a lot! 💙 We’re really glad the game feels relaxing to you — that’s exactly the kind of experience we hope to create. Enjoy playing and thanks for the lovely feedback! 🌿🎮

~VR Factory Games
